acquisition method: The mass spectrometer was operated in DDA mode with dynamic exclusion enabled 15 s
alkylation reagent: 40 mM 2-chloroacetamide (Sigma-Aldrich) in 8 M urea 100 mM Tris pH 8
cleavage agent: the specified enzyme was trypsin with up to 2 missed cleavage allowed
instrument: connected to a quadrupole Orbitrap QExactive-HF mass spectrometer
ionization type: equipped with a nanoelectrospray ion source
